reforms.description: The Government has adopted a series of tax cuts, subsidy, and loan schemes aimed at revitalising industrial production, which includes increased grants for research and development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased funding for R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the industrial sector.
reforms.status_evidence: Grants for research and development are increased as part of the adopted schemes.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in government policy towards supporting industrial innovation through enhanced R&D funding, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: With the objective of revitalising industrial production, a series of tax cuts, subsidy and loan schemes are adopted - interalia - grants for research and development are increased.
